goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:30' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'birmingham new street'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:30 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from birmingham new street
Make sure you get travel time and price
